annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under D.C. Code § 15-108 — 6% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from D.C.’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
